user.title: Timekpra SSH Connection
user.description: Configure the SSH connection to the remote machine running Timekpra.

data_description.ssh_host_vpn: Optional: IP address when connected via VPN
data_description.auth_method: Choose how to authenticate: SSH password or private key.
data_description.ssh_password: Required when using password authentication. Also used for sudo.
data_description.ssh_key: Paste the full private key (PEM/OpenSSH). Required when using key authentication.
data_description.ssh_key_passphrase: Optional: passphrase protecting the private key.
data_description.sudo_password: Optional. Password for sudo on the remote machine. Leave empty if sudo is configured with NOPASSWD (typical with key authentication).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect via SSH. Please check host, port, and credentials.
error.password_required: A password is required for password authentication.
error.key_required: A private key is required for key authentication.
error.invalid_key: The private key could not be read. Check its format and passphrase.
